creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to ml from comment #0)

I tried test build of security/clamav with following conditions.

* Host is 13.0-RELEASE amd64
* Poudriere is 3.3.7_1 (ports-mgmt/poudriere)
* Jail is 12.2-RELEASE amd64
* Ports tree is ports a459c4ab2ea9 (2021Q4 branch)
* Setting of all options are default. That is, DOCS option is on.

But build succeeds without any error.
